async def worker_dashboard(update, context):
    import subprocess
    worker_status = subprocess.getoutput("systemctl is-active sameer_ai_worker_auto.service")
    task_status = subprocess.getoutput("ls /root/sameer_ai_manager/ai_worker/queue | wc -l")
    completed_tasks = subprocess.getoutput("ls /root/sameer_ai_manager/ai_worker/completed | wc -l")
    failed_tasks = subprocess.getoutput("ls /root/sameer_ai_manager/ai_worker/failed | wc -l")
    msg = f"📊 WORKER DASHBOARD

🛠 Worker Status: {worker_status}
🟡 Tasks in Queue: {task_status}
🟢 Completed Tasks: {completed_tasks}
🔴 Failed Tasks: {failed_tasks}"
    await update.message.reply_text(msg)

app.run_polling(drop_pending_updates=True)
risk: Low - The patch adds a new command without altering existing functionalities.
